title: Briefing Packages – Minister and Deputy Minister - Canada.ca
content:
## Briefing Packages – Minister and Deputy Minister
Briefing packages prepared for the purpose of enabling a new Minister or Deputy Minister to assume their new responsibilities.

## Ministerial Briefing Material
- Deputy Ministerial Briefing Book
- Deputy Minister of Health Briefing Book: Health Portfolio Overview
- Ministerial Transition April 2025
- Minister of Health pocket book
- Ministerial Briefing Volume I: Overview of the Health Portfolio
- Minister of Health pocket book
- Deputy Minister Briefing Material
- Ministerial briefing volume I: Overview of the Health Portfolio
- Ministerial briefing volume II: Health Portfolio priorities
- Minister of Mental Health and Addictions pocket book
- Minister of Health pocketbook
- Ministerial Briefing Volume I - Overview of the Health Portfolio
- Ministerial Briefing Volume II - COVID overview
- Ministerial Briefing Volume III - First 100 days
- Minister of Health Pocket Book - Pocket book with Health Portfolio highlights
- Minister of Mental Health and Addictions and Associate Minister of Health Pocket Book - Pocket book with Health Portfolio highlights
- Ministerial Briefing Volume I - Overview of the Health Portfolio
- Ministerial Briefing Volume II - First 100 days
- Minister of Health Pocket Book - Pocket book with Health Portfolio highlights
- Deputy Minister Briefing Material - Overview of Health Canada as well as information on Governance and Operations
- Table of Contents - Briefing material provided to the Health Minister (Volume I - VI)
